conbody.p: Overview: SOI/ROM Impact dashboard enables CDI leaders to assess the program impact on severity and risk of mortality. A SOI/ROM Impact dashboard helps the CDI Director to view the SOI/ROM trends that resulted from the CDS review activity and analyze the overall performance of the CDI program.
The report provides answers to the following questions.

ul.li: Is the CDI program resulting in an appropriate shift to higher SOI/ROM categories?
How is my SOI/ROM before and after CDI trending?

conbody.p: Navigation: On the Analytics home page left side panel, navigate to CDE One Executive Summary SOI/ROM Impact .

SOI/ROM Impact displays the following:
KPI Cards: % Cases with SOI Impact, % Cases with ROM Impact
SOI Impact Chart
ROM Impact Chart
SOI Before CDI Trend Chart
ROM Before CDI Trend Chart
SOI After CDI Trend Chart
ROM After CDI Trend Chart
On the top panel, you can select desired values for the slicers (refer ) and the corresponding data gets filtered in the tabular chart.
For filters on all pages, refer .

entry.p: This KPI displays the percentage of reconciled cases that had an upward shift in the SOI (SOI After > SOI Before) due to CDS' work on the encounters.
Advanced SOI/ROM Values are used if Primary SOI/ROM values are blank.

row.entry: % cases with SOI Impact= The total count of Reconciled encounters(Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) for which the SOI After is greater than SOI Before./ Total count of Reconciled encounters(Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact)
Encounters with status Reconciled Impact, Reconciled No Impact, and Auto Reconciled are considered in this metric calculation.

This metric displays the percentage of reconciled cases that had an upward shift in the ROM(ROM After > ROM Before) due to CDS' work on the encounters
Advanced SOI/ROM Values are used if Primary SOI/ROM values are blank.

% cases with ROM Impact= The total count of Reconciled encounters(Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) for which the ROM After is greater than ROM Before./ Total count of Reconciled encounters(Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact)
Encounters with status Reconciled Impact, Reconciled No Impact, and Auto Reconciled are considered in this metric calculation.

conbody.p:
The SOI Impact charts displays the percentage of reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled Impact, Reconciled- No Impact) with SOI Before CDI and percentage of reconciled encounters with SOI after CDI for each SOI Category for the selected date range.
X-axis: Displays the values in the format: SOI 3, SOI 4 etc.
Y-axis: Displays the percentage of reconciled encounters.
Sort Order: Data in the chart is sorted by SOI value in ascending order.
Info icon(text on hover): Percentage of reconciled cases that had an upward shift in the SOI (SOI After > SOI Before) due to CDS' work on the encounters. Encounter Status: Reconciled-Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, Auto-Reconciled.

row.entry:
This metric displays the percentage of cases reconciled with the SOI before CDI for each SOI category.
Advanced SOI/ROM Values are used if Primary SOI/ROM values are blank.

entry.p: % Reconciled Cases with SOI Before = Count of cases reconciled with the SOI before CDI for each SOI category/ Total Reconciled encounters (Auto-Reconciled, Reconciled- Impact, Reconciled-No Impact).
Reconciled Cases with SOI Before: Count of cases reconciled with the SOI before CDI for each SOI category.
Reconciled Cases with SOI After: Count of cases reconciled with the SOI after CDI for each SOI category.

row.entry:
This metric displays the percentage of cases reconciled with the SOI after CDI for each SOI category.
Advanced SOI/ROM Values are used if Primary SOI/ROM values are blank.
Format: Bar

entry.p: % Reconciled Cases with SOI After = Count of cases reconciled with the SOI After CDI for each SOI category/ Total Reconciled encounters (Auto-Reconciled, Reconciled- Impact, Reconciled-No Impact).

conbody.p:
The ROM Impact charts displays the percentage of reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled Impact, Reconciled- No Impact) with ROM Before CDI and percentage of reconciled encounters with ROM after CDI for each ROM Category.
X-axis: Displays the values in the format: ROM 3, ROM 4 etc.
Y-axis: Displays the percentage of reconciled encounters.
Sort Order: Data in the chart is sorted by ROM value in ascending order.
Info icon(text on hover): Percentage of reconciled cases that had an upward shift in the ROM (ROM After > ROM Before) due to CDS' work on the encounters. Encounter Status: Reconciled-Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, Auto-Reconciled.

row.entry:
This metric displays the percentage of cases reconciled with the ROM before CDI for each ROM category.
Advanced SOI/ROM Values are used if Primary SOI/ROM values are blank.

entry.p: % Reconciled Cases with ROM Before = Count of cases reconciled with the ROM before CDI for each ROM category/ Total Reconciled encounters (Auto-Reconciled, Reconciled- Impact, Reconciled-No Impact).
Reconciled Cases with ROM Before: Count of cases reconciled with the ROM before CDI for each ROM category.
Reconciled Cases with ROM After: Count of cases reconciled with the ROM after CDI for each ROM category.

row.entry:
This metric displays the percentage of cases reconciled with the ROM after CDI for each ROM category.
Advanced SOI/ROM Values are used if Primary SOI/ROM values are blank.
Format: Bar

entry.p: % Reconciled Cases with ROM After = Count of cases reconciled with the ROM After CDI for each ROM category/ Total Reconciled encounters (Auto-Reconciled, Reconciled- Impact, Reconciled-No Impact).

p.b: SOI/ROM Impact - SOI Before CDI Trend Chart

conbody.p:
SOI Before CDI Trend - This chart displays the percentage of reconciled cases with SOI 1, SOI 2, SOI 3, and SOI 4 before CDI for each month.
X-axis: Displays the name of the discharge month and year in the format: MMM YYYY (ex: Feb 2020, Aug 2020)
Y-axis: Displays the percentage of encounters.
Info icon(text on hover): SOI Before: Reconciliation Assessment DRG (Primary/Advanced) SOI (Working DRG SOI when Discharge Date < 11/14/19 or Reconciliation Assessment DRG is blank) Encounter Status: Reconciled-Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, Auto-Reconciled.
SOI Before CDI Trend Metrics
Metric Description Formula/Calculation Exclusion Criteria (if any) Tooltip
% SOI 1 Encounters
The percentage of reconciled cases with SOI Before CDI as 1.
Note:
If the SOI associated with the primary DRG is not available, then the SOI associated with the advanced DRG is used.
% SOI 1 Encounters = The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Reconciliation Assessment SOI as 1.(or Working SOI as 1 when Discharge Date < 11/14/19 or Reconciliation Assessment DRG is blank)/ The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact).
Reconciled Cases with SOI 1 Before: Count of reconciled encounters with Reconciliation Assessment SOI as 1.(or Working SOI as 1 when Discharge Date < 11/14/19 or Reconciliation Assessment DRG is blank).
% SOI 2 Encounters
The percentage of reconciled cases with SOI Before CDI as 2.
Note:
If the SOI associated with the primary DRG is not available, then the SOI associated with the advanced DRG is used.
% SOI 2 Encounters = The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Reconciliation Assessment SOI as 2.(or Working SOI as 2 when Discharge Date < 11/14/19 or Reconciliation Assessment DRG is blank)/ The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact)
Reconciled Cases with SOI 2 Before: Count of reconciled encounters with Reconciliation Assessment SOI as 2.(or Working SOI as 2 when Discharge Date < 11/14/19 or Reconciliation Assessment DRG is blank).
% SOI 3 Encounters
The percentage of reconciled cases with SOI Before CDI as 3.
Note:
If the SOI associated with the primary DRG is not available, then the SOI associated with the advanced DRG is used.
% SOI 3 Encounters = The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Reconciliation Assessment SOI as 3.(or Working SOI as 3 when Discharge Date < 11/14/19 or Reconciliation Assessment DRG is blank)/ The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact)
Reconciled Cases with SOI 3 Before: Count of reconciled encounters with Reconciliation Assessment SOI as 3.(or Working SOI as 3 when Discharge Date < 11/14/19 or Reconciliation Assessment DRG is blank).
% SOI 4 Encounters
The percentage of reconciled cases with SOI Before CDI as 4.
Note:
If the SOI associated with the primary DRG is not available, then the SOI associated with the advanced DRG is used.
% SOI 4 Encounters = The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Reconciliation Assessment SOI as 4.(or Working SOI as 4 when Discharge Date < 11/14/19 or Reconciliation Assessment DRG is blank)/ The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact)
Reconciled Cases with SOI 4 Before: Count of reconciled encounters with Reconciliation Assessment SOI as 4.(or Working SOI as 4 when Discharge Date < 11/14/19 or Reconciliation Assessment DRG is blank).

p.b: SOI/ROM Impact - ROM Before CDI Trend Chart

conbody.p:
- This chart displays the percentage of reconciled cases with ROM 1, ROM 2, ROM 3, and ROM 4 before CDI for each month
X-axis: Displays the name of the discharge month and year in the format: MMM YYYY (ex: Feb 2020, Aug 2020)
Y-axis: Displays the percentage of encounters.
Info icon(text on hover): ROM Before: Reconciliation Assessment DRG (Primary/Advanced) ROM (Working DRG ROM when Discharge Date < 11/14/19 or Reconciliation Assessment DRG is blank Encounter Status: Reconciled-Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, Auto-Reconciled.
ROM Before CDI Trend Metrics
Metric Description Formula/Calculation Exclusion Criteria (if any) Tooltip
% ROM 1 Encounters
The percentage of reconciled cases with ROM Before CDI as 1.
Note:
If the ROM associated with the primary DRG is not available, then the ROM associated with the advanced DRG is used.
% ROM 1 Encounters = The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Reconciliation Assessment ROM as 1.(or Working ROM as 1 when Discharge Date < 11/14/19 or Reconciliation Assessment DRG is blank)/ The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact)
Reconciled Cases with ROM 1 Before: Count of reconciled encounters with Reconciliation Assessment ROM as 1.(or Working ROM as 1 when Discharge Date < 11/14/19 or Reconciliation Assessment DRG is blank).
% ROM 2 Encounters
The percentage of reconciled cases with ROM Before CDI as 2.
Note:
If the ROM associated with the primary DRG is not available, then the ROM associated with the advanced DRG is used.
% ROM 2 Encounters = The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Reconciliation Assessment ROM as 2.(or Working ROM as 2 when Discharge Date < 11/14/19 or Reconciliation Assessment DRG is blank)/ The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact)
Reconciled Cases with ROM 2 Before: Count of reconciled encounters with Reconciliation Assessment ROM as 2.(or Working ROM as 2 when Discharge Date < 11/14/19 or Reconciliation Assessment DRG is blank).
% ROM 3 Encounters
The percentage of reconciled cases with ROM Before CDI as 3.
Note:
If the ROM associated with the primary DRG is not available, then the ROM associated with the advanced DRG is used.
% ROM 3 Encounters = The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Reconciliation Assessment ROM as 3.(or Working ROM as 3 when Discharge Date < 11/14/19 or Reconciliation Assessment DRG is blank)/ The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact)
Reconciled Cases with ROM 3 Before: Count of reconciled encounters with Reconciliation Assessment ROM as 3.(or Working ROM as 3 when Discharge Date < 11/14/19 or Reconciliation Assessment DRG is blank).
% ROM 4 Encounters
The percentage of reconciled cases with ROM Before CDI as 4.
Note:
If the ROM associated with the primary DRG is not available, then the ROM associated with the advanced DRG is used.
% ROM 4 Encounters = The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Reconciliation Assessment ROM as 4.(or Working ROM as 4 when Discharge Date < 11/14/19 or Reconciliation Assessment DRG is blank)/ The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact)
Reconciled Cases with ROM 4 Before: Count of reconciled encounters with Reconciliation Assessment ROM as 4.(or Working ROM as 4 when Discharge Date < 11/14/19 or Reconciliation Assessment DRG is blank).

p.b: SOI/ROM Impact - SOI After CDI Trend Chart

conbody.p:
This chart displays the percentage of reconciled cases with SOI 1, SOI 2, SOI3, and SOI 4 after CDI for each month.
X-axis: Displays the name of the discharge month and year in the format: MMM YYYY (ex: Feb 2020, Aug 2020)
Y-axis: Displays the percentage of encounters.
Info icon(text on hover): SOI After: Final Coding SOI. Advanced DRG SOI value is used when Primary DRG SOI is blank. Encounter Status: Reconciled-Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, Auto-Reconciled.
SOI After CDI Trend Metrics
Metric Description Formula/Calculation Exclusion Criteria (if any) Tooltip
% SOI 1 Encounters
The percentage of reconciled cases with SOI After CDI as 1.
Note:
If the SOI associated with the primary DRG is not available, then the SOI associated with the advanced DRG is used.
% SOI 1 Encounters= The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Final Coded SOI as 1./Total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact)
% SOI 2 Encounters
The percentage of reconciled cases with SOI After CDI as 2.
Note:
If the SOI associated with the primary DRG is not available, then the SOI associated with the advanced DRG is used.
% SOI 2 Encounters = The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Final Coded SOI as 2./Total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact)
% SOI 3 Encounters
The percentage of reconciled cases with SOI After CDI as 3.
Note:
If the SOI associated with the primary DRG is not available, then the SOI associated with the advanced DRG is used.
% SOI 3 Encounters = The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Final Coded SOI as 3./Total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact)
% SOI 4 Encounters
The percentage of reconciled cases with SOI After CDI as 4.
Note:
If the SOI associated with the primary DRG is not available, then the SOI associated with the advanced DRG is used.
% SOI 4 Encounters = The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Final Coded SOI as 4./Total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact)

p.b: SOI/ROM Impact - ROM After CDI Trend Chart

conbody.p:
This chart displays the percentage of reconciled cases with ROM 1, ROM 2, ROM 3, and ROM 4 after CDI for each month.
X-axis: Displays the name of the discharge month and year in the format: MMM YYYY (Example: Feb 2020, Aug 2020)
Y-axis: Displays the percentage of encounters.
Legend Titles: % ROM 1 Encounters, % ROM 2 Encounters, % ROM 3 Encounters, % ROM 4 Encounters
Info icon(text on hover): ROM After: Final Coding ROM. Advanced DRG ROM value is used when Primary DRG ROM is blank. Encounter Status: Reconciled-Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, Auto-Reconciled.
ROM After CDI Trend Metrics
Metric Description Formula/Tooltip Exclusion Criteria (if any) Tooltip
% ROM 1 Encounters
The percentage of reconciled cases with ROM After CDI as 1.
Note:
If the ROM associated with the primary DRG is not available, then the ROM associated with the advanced DRG is used.
% ROM 1 Encounters = The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Final Coded ROM as 1./Total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact)
% ROM 2 Encounters
The percentage of reconciled cases with ROM After CDI as 2.
Note:
If the ROM associated with the primary DRG is not available, then the ROM associated with the advanced DRG is used.
% ROM 2 Encounters = The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Final Coded ROM as 2./Total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact)
% ROM 3 Encounters
The percentage of reconciled cases with ROM After CDI as 3
Note:
If the ROM associated with the primary DRG is not available, then the ROM associated with the advanced DRG is used.
% ROM 3 Encounters = The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Final Coded ROM as 3./Total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact)
% ROM 4 Encounters
The percentage of reconciled cases with ROM After CDI as 4.
Note:
If the ROM associated with the primary DRG is not available, then the ROM associated with the advanced DRG is used.
% ROM 4 Encounters = The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Final Coded ROM as 4./Total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact)

ul.li: Displays the discharge date range.
You can select date from the lookup provided.
Default: Last 3 calendar months date range selected by default.
With the Reset button, you can reset the Discharge date range.
Tooltip: Use "Ctrl + Click" to reset the Discharge Date.
Displays both active and inactive facilities in alphabetical order that you have access to.
You can select multiple facilities.
You can search the facility by Facility ID or Description.
Format: Facility Description (Facility ID)
Default: ALL
Displays both active and inactive payers in alphabetical order associated with the facilities you have access to.
You can select multiple payers.
"Unassigned Payer" displays data for the encounters that do not have a payer assigned.
You can search the Payer by Payer ID or Description.
Format: Payer Description (Payer ID)
Default: ALL
Displays the available patient types. Example: Inpatient, Outpatient.
Default: Inpatient
Displays the list of available units.
You can select multiple Units.
You can search the Unit.
Default: ALL
Displays the list of available admit service.
You can select multiple Units.
You can search the Admit Service.
Default: ALL
Displays the available patient types.Example: ED, IP, etc.
You can select multiple Visit Type.
You can search the Visit Type.
Default: ALL
Displays the available DRG Specialties. Example: Transplant, Surgery, Neurosurgery
You can select multiple specialties.
You can search the DRG Specialty.
Default: ALL

row.entry: % cases with SOI Impact= (Count of Reconciled encounters with SOI After > SOI Before/Count of Reconciled encounters.) X100
% cases with ROM Impact= (Count of Reconciled encounters with ROM After >ROM Before/Count of Reconciled encounters.) X100
